short_blurb: Roofing for Whittier homes — historic and modern.
local_note: Whittier's historic Uptown district includes Craftsman bungalows and Spanish Colonial homes dating to the early 20th century — and the surrounding neighborhoods span everything from post-war tract homes to Friendly Hills' upscale properties. We handle tile restoration in Uptown and full re-roofs throughout East Whittier.
